name: Rating Standardizer
overview: Normalize official ratings across your library.
description: Automatically standardizes official ratings for movies and series using configurable mappings. Supports library update events and scheduled batch processing.

versions.changelog: - feat: add plugin release metadata and artwork (a798871)- feat: refine ratings plugin defaults and docs (1b46d8e)- feat: add launch-all action to build and start Jellyfin & Emby together (a2b3bbb)- feat(jellyfin): update Jellyfin plugin configuration and core wiring (6c56160)- feat(emby): update Emby plugin configuration and core wiring (6cef93b)- feat: add LibraryFilter scaffolds for Emby and Jellyfin (300fa3a)- Add sidebar display for settings page and clean up Plugin.cs (3a0ee63)- Add scheduled task support for batch rating conversion (9a022dd)- first commit (ef8c4e2)
